name: ASUS TUF GAMING B760-PLUS WIFI D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - Intel B760 Chipset - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B760-PLUS WIFI D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6.
